title: Better with FPS Minimal
description: this modpack offers a more smooth experience for modded minecraft
body:
Better with FPS minimal is a minimal,optimized and doesn't have most of the Qol mods you will have with the normal version is built to significantly increase Minecraft performance, offering smoother gameplay on all systems.

🔧 Features:
Massive FPS boost with Sodium, Lithium, and more

Clean and efficient, with Optifine-like enhancements

Ideal for low-end PCs, PvP, and performance-focused players

**WARNING!:some mod can crash the game please do not use mod who are very heavy to load**
### This modpack will not be in archive but do not expect frequent updates -UpsidedownProduction
